problems.text: A bag holds shapes cut out of cardboard — some are triangles and some are quadrilaterals (four-sided shapes). Altogether there are 10 shapes with 36 corners in total. How many of the shapes are triangles?
A three-digit number is odd, and its three digits add up to 3. All three digits are different. What is the number?
problems.label: The number:

problems.text: What element of the pattern comes in place of the question mark?

problems.html: Liars and Truth-Tellers. On the Island of Unambiguity live strange people: truth-tellers (who always tell the truth) and liars (who always lie). A resident named Mark said to his friends: “Yesterday my neighbor told me that he (the neighbor) is a liar!” Who is Mark — a truth-teller or a liar?

problems.text: Use the balance scales to find the missing number:
In which of the figures is exactly one half of the area shaded?
